title: How to Use AI for Creative Work: 7 Things to Try
description: Here are seven simple ways to use AI to supercharge your creative work. With an AI text-to-image tool, you could type “cosy cafe with soft lighting” and watch it create in seconds. You can also ask AI to make tweaks, like tweaking lighting, colours, or camera angles. Learning how to write AI art prompts takes [...] The post How to Use AI for Creative Work: 7 Things to Try appeared first on Vibes Of India .

title: AI Robot: Clean Your House, Cook Your Food!
description: Over the last few years, the kind of advancements that are being observed in the robotic industry are beyond measure.

title: Teachers use AI for lesson planning but question its value for student learning
description: Teachers have found AI useful for drafting lesson plans and newsletters, but most still can't answer a basic question: what does it actually do for students in the classroom? Three years in, cautious and selective beats wholesale adoption.

title: I Was So Wrong About Upstart: Do Not Ignore The AI Threat
description: Upstart (UPST) downgraded to Sell: margins stagnate, macro risks rise, AI competition grows, and valuation looks rich. Read here for more details.

title: India’s JNS Cloud Solutions launches landmark AI Skilling initiative for Africa
description: “The initiative leverages India's proven track record in building scalable digital public infrastructure to support Africa’s growing economic aspirations,” said Nagaraju Gurrala, CEO of JNS Cloud Solutions
